methodology: hard-include GT-target + tokenizer specials; fill by broad-corpus (MMLU-Pro) frequency. No decode/context hard-include -- those are public-prompt-specific.
tight_ceiling_note: must-keep ∪ public-128 decode ∪ GT-context; public-overfit, NOT shipped

decode_outside_kept.note: public greedy emissions the shipped cut would clip vs the unpruned model; fidelity risk only, see clip_floor_ksweep.json

residual_risk_private_ppl: a PRIVATE GT-target token outside kept -> -inf logit -> +inf PPL on a private re-run; not closable locally (only by widening K toward full vocab).
